:::{.cards-grid .cards-grid--bottom}
:::{.info-card .info-card--founders}
<div class="info-card__header">
  <span class="info-card__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <img src="img/icons/person.svg" alt="" class="info-card__icon-img">
  </span>
  <h2 class="info-card__heading">Course founders</h2>
</div>

:::{.people-list}
- **SciLifeLab Training Hub**
:::
:::

:::{.info-card .info-card--contributors}
<div class="info-card__header">
  <span class="info-card__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <img src="img/icons/group.svg" alt="" class="info-card__icon-img">
  </span>
  <h2 class="info-card__heading">Contributors</h2>
</div>

:::{.people-list}
- **Open Science Team**
- **DDLS training collaborators**
:::
:::
:::
